This SNOMED-CT based include has some concepts with semantic tags (FSN terms) and some without (preferred terms) - check that this is what is intended (examples for FSN: [Meningeal neoplasm (morphology), Crushing injury (morphology)] and examples for no FSN: [Diffuse fibroelastosis, Stenosis, Hemi-Fontan pathway, Adenolymphoma, Complex caries])
